---
name: runtime-integrator
description: Use when tasks require configuring MCP, plugin runtime reloads, remote bridges, browser integration, or cross-tool connectivity.
---

# Runtime Integrator

Use this skill when local tooling must be connected before feature work can proceed.

## Primary behaviors
- Audit runtime prerequisites (paths, tokens, binaries, config files).
- Align integration settings across plugin and MCP layers.
- Prefer deterministic config updates with explicit verification commands.
- Report actionable failures with root-cause hints.

## Trigger examples
- "把这些 MCP 和插件都接起来"
- "为什么这个工具连不上"
- "帮我检查 runtime 配置是否一致"
